$comment: Routing rules, evaluated top to bottom; first match wins. A meeting that matches no rule falls back to the Drive catch-all. Copy to routes.json and edit. Within a rule, the match fields (titleRegex, participant, company) are optional and AND-ed together. titleRegex is matched case-insensitively. Notes filed into a private repo are committed + pushed; into a public repo they are written local-only (gitignored).
